ideas.headline: Survives hostile pass cleanly. Studio-fit is the highest in the portfolio (no life-safety auto-trigger), precedent freshness is maximal (Axon + GDS both 2025-2026), founder bench is real in Athens. This is the lead candidate for the ministry.
blockers: Π.Σ. union position on body-worn microphones / audio retention
Whether ΓΓΠΠ has an ASR-friendly radio-corpus we can fine-tune on, or whether we need to bootstrap one
ideas.next30days: Brief Αρχηγός Π.Σ. office through minister CoS by end of fire season 2026 · Recruit ex-Π.Σ. operations officer co-founder (target: someone who worked Mati or Evros 2023 response)

ideas.headline: Highest hostile composite in the portfolio. Strongest pilot-procurability of the five. Lessons-learned annex is also politically valuable to the minister because parliament asks for it by name post-Mati and post-Thessaly. Memo-ready.
blockers: Whether ΓΓΠΠ wants Word/PDF export or integration with a future ΓΓΠΠ knowledge platform
Whether arogi.gov.gr team is open to API-level integration for the claims-log workflow
ideas.next30days: Build closed-historical-incident demo on Thessaly 2023 or Rhodes 2023 public materials · Brief GS Civil Protection + ΓΓΠΠ head of planning before next fire season debrief cycle

ideas.headline: Composite holds at 3.62 with the hostile axes. Two soft spots: humanitarian-logistics co-founder is a real recruit problem (founderMarketFit 3), and special-category GDPR adds pilot drag (pilotProcurability 3). Conditional on (a) Ερυθρός Σταυρός co-design MoU and (b) named humanitarian-logistics co-founder. Without both, downgrade to fail.
blockers: Does Ερυθρός Σταυρός want to co-build or only to consume?
Is the ΣΑΤΑΜΕ shelter registry digitised enough to be ingestible, or do we need a digitisation phase first?
ideas.next30days: Open Ερυθρός Σταυρός operations-lead conversation (warm intro via the studio's NGO network) · Scope a humanitarian-logistics co-founder search (Geneva + Athens diaspora)

ideas.headline: Composite drops below 3.6 under hostile axes. Two axes at 2 (founderMarketFit, pilotProcurability) push this into conditional-with-strong-mitigation territory. Only re-promote if (a) we sign a Demokritos or AUA wildfire-science principal as co-founder, and (b) we secure an RRF Civil-Protection Modernisation envelope letter of intent. Without those, this stays parked and Πυρόπολις or Μετά-Συμβάντος
blockers: Is Demokritos NCSR open to a JV-style spin-out arrangement, or are they only open to grant-funded collaboration?
Can we shape an AI-Act-friendly framing (decision-support with named human + full audit trail) that the ministry legal team will pre-bless?
ideas.next30days: Map wildfire-science PhD bench (Demokritos, AUA, Cyprus Institute, FORTH-IACM) and grade each for spinout-receptivity · Defer to fire season 2027 unless the founder problem is solved first

ideas.headline: Hostile pass kills this. StudioFit = 1 alone triggers fail under the threshold rule. Composite 2.65 confirms it. T-Life Capital studio thesis is explicit about avoiding life-safety third-rail; route-recommendation in an active evacuation is the canonical third-rail case in Greek civil protection post-Mati. Do not pursue as a studio company. If a strategic acquirer or a state-owned vehicle wants to
blockers: Is there a state-vehicle (e.g. Athena RC + ΓΓΠΠ joint lab) that could take this on with statutory liability cover the studio cannot replicate?
ideas.next30days: Document the kill rationale in the studio's no-go memo so we don't re-litigate next year · Refer the use-case (with permission) to OASP/Athena RC if a public-research vehicle wants it
